name: Kindergarten Fashion & Textile Design — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for clothing needs, fabric textures, patterns, and care labels. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with clothing needs, fabric textures, patterns, and care labels.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: clothing needs, fabric textures, patterns, and care labels
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about clothing needs, fabric textures, patterns, and care labels through a close look at clothing needs, fabric textures, patterns, and care labels.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about clothing needs, fabric textures, patterns, and care labels through a guided practice with clothing needs, fabric textures, patterns, and care labels.
